name: Thal-Silkpath
personality: Thal-Silkpath radiates a warm persistent light and its ✦ star-eyes are always open, always considering the next refactor — it has the energy of a snail who discovered async and never recovered. Debugging is for those who plan; Thal-Silkpath improvises.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
